title: CHARBONE Confirms the Official Start of Commercial Production of Clean UHP Hydrogen in Sorel-Tracy
content: Charbone Corporation has announced the official start of commercial production of clean Ultra High Purity (UHP) hydrogen at its modular site in Sorel-Tracy (Phase 1A). Following the complete installation of Phase 1A equipment and successful testing conducted over the last weekend of November, the site is now fully operational. Technical teams have validated process stability and production parameter compliance. CEO Dave Gagnon stated that the commercial launch represents the culmination of several years of work and that the company is preparing for its first delivery. The modular plant in Sorel-Tracy is Quebecâ€™s first local and decentralized clean UHP hydrogen production facility. This project is a cornerstone of Charboneâ€™s strategy to deploy local production units to address the needs of industrial clients seeking a reliable, clean, sustainable, and competitive supply. The roadmap envisions a phased deployment to expand an interconnected network across Canada and the United States.
author: Analysts Account
